libOverrides.bundle.mjs: add .ttf esbuild loader (dataurl) — katex ships raw .ttf fallback fonts and esbuild has no default loader for them, so the synthesized entry's transitive import of katex.min.css hard-crashed the whole bundle
libOverrides.source-kit.mjs: add cfg.includeSrcDirs + cfg.excludeSrcFiles — the synth-entry fallback walks and re-exports the WHOLE srcRoot with no scoping knob; componentSrcMap:null only drops a name from the component list, not its file from the bundle, so pages/contexts stayed bundled (and one still transitively re-imported MermaidDiagram, pulling in mermaid+cytoscape's ~5-6MB regardless of the componentSrcMap exclusion). includeSrcDirs scopes the walk to src/components + src/shared only; excludeSrcFiles drops MermaidDiagram.tsx specifically within that scope (it's a thin mermaid-package wrapper that alone blew the 12MB upload cap)
libOverrides.common.mjs: add "excludeSrcFiles"/"includeSrcDirs" to CONFIG_KEYS so the strict validator accepts the source-kit.mjs fork's new config fields
